content.content:
1→#!/usr/bin/env node
     2→/**
     3→ * Deploy a Falcon-512 account on Starknet and send a test transfer.
     4→ *
     5→ * Environment variables:
     6→ *   CLASS_HASH        — declared FalconAccount class hash (required)
     7→ *   FALCON_WASM_PATH  — path to Node.js WASM package (default: bin/.wasm-nodejs)
     8→ *   RPC_URL           — JSON-RPC endpoint (default: http://localhost:5050/rpc)
     9→ */
    10→
    11→import { createRequire } from "module"
    12→import { dirname, resolve } from "path"
    13→import { fileURLToPath } from "url"
    14→import {
    15→  RpcProvider, Account, hash, stark, CallData, SignerInterface,
    16→  transaction, EDAMode,
    17→} from "../apps/demo/node_modules/starknet/dist/index.mjs"
    18→
    19→const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url))
    20→
    21→// --- Config ---
    22→const CLASS_HASH = process.env.CLASS_HASH
    23→if (!CLASS_HASH) {
    24→  console.error("ERROR: CLASS_HASH env var is required")
    25→  process.exit(1)
    26→}
    27→const RPC_URL = process.env.RPC_URL || "http://localhost:5050/rpc"
    28→const WASM_PATH = resolve(process.env.FALCON_WASM_PATH || `${__dirname}/.wasm-nodejs`)
    29→
    30→const require = createRequire(import.meta.url)
    31→const falcon = require(resolve(WASM_PATH, "falcon_rs.js"))
    32→
    33→const provider = new RpcProvider({ nodeUrl: RPC_URL })
    34→
    35→// --- Helpers ---
    36→
    37→/** Deserialize 896-byte VK into 512 time-domain Int32Array coefficients */
    38→function parsePublicKey(vkBytes) {
    39→  const Q = 12289, N = 512, BITS = 14
    40→  const coeffs = new Int32Array(N)
    41→  const mask = (1 << BITS) - 1
    42→  let bitBuffer = 0, bitsInBuffer = 0, byteIndex = 0
    43→  for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
    44→    while (bitsInBuffer < BITS) {
    45→      bitBuffer |= vkBytes[byteIndex++] << bitsInBuffer
    46→      bitsInBuffer += 8
    47→    }
    48→    const coeff = bitBuffer & mask
    49→    bitBuffer >>= BITS
    50→    bitsInBuffer -= BITS
    51→    if (coeff >= Q) throw new Error(`Invalid VK coeff ${coeff} at ${i}`)
    52→    coeffs[i] = coeff
    53→  }
    54→  return coeffs
    55→}
    56→
    57→/** Convert Int32Array to Uint16Array for pack_public_key_wasm */
    58→function toUint16(arr) {
    59→  const u16 = new Uint16Array(arr.length)
    60→  for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) u16[i] = arr[i]
    61→  return u16
    62→}
    63→
    64→/** Fund an address via devnet JSON-RPC mint */
    65→async function mintFunds(address, amount, unit) {
    66→  const baseUrl = RPC_URL.replace(/\/rpc.*$/, "")
    67→  const resp = await fetch(baseUrl, {
    68→    method: "POST",
    69→    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    70→    body: JSON.stringify({
    71→      jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1,
    72→      method: "devnet_mint",
    73→      params: { address, amount, unit },
    74→    }),
    75→  })
    76→  if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`Mint failed: ${resp.status} ${await resp.text()}`)
    77→  const json = await resp.json()
    78→  if (json.error) throw new Error(`Mint error: ${JSON.stringify(json.error)}`)
    79→  return json.result
    80→}
    81→
    82→/** Get STRK balance of an address */
    83→async function getBalance(address) {
    84→  const STRK = "0x04718f5a0fc34cc1af16a1cdee98ffb20c31f5cd61d6ab07201858f4287c938d"
    85→  const result = await provider.callContract({
    86→    contractAddress: STRK,
    87→    entrypoint: "balanceOf",
    88→    calldata: [address],
    89→  })
    90→  return BigInt(result[0])
    91→}
    92→
    93→// --- Falcon Signer ---
    94→
    95→const RESOURCE_BOUNDS = {
    96→  l2_gas: { max_amount: 0x2FAF080n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
    97→  l1_gas: { max_amount: 0x0n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
    98→  l1_data_gas: { max_amount: 0x3000n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
    99→}
   100→
   101→class FalconSigner extends SignerInterface {
   102→  constructor(sk, pkNtt) {
   103→    super()
   104→    this.sk = sk
   105→    this.pkNtt = pkNtt
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  async getPubKey() { return "0x0" }
   109→  async signMessage() { throw new Error("signMessage not implemented") }
   110→  async signDeclareTransaction() { throw new Error("signDeclareTransaction not implemented") }
   111→
   112→  async signTransaction(transactions, details) {
   113→    const compiledCalldata = transaction.getExecuteCalldata(transactions, details.cairoVersion)
   114→    const txHash = hash.calculateInvokeTransactionHash({
   115→      ...details,
   116→      senderAddress: details.walletAddress,
   117→      compiledCalldata,
   118→      version: details.version,
   119→      nonceDataAvailabilityMode: details.nonceDataAvailabilityMode === "L1" ? EDAMode.L1 : EDAMode.L2,
   120→      feeDataAvailabilityMode: details.feeDataAvailabilityMode === "L1" ? EDAMode.L1 : EDAMode.L2,
   121→    })
   122→    return this._sign(txHash)
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  async signDeployAccountTransaction(details) {
   126→    const compiledConstructorCalldata = CallData.compile(details.constructorCalldata)
   127→    const txHash = hash.calculateDeployAccountTransactionHash({
   128→      ...details,
   129→      salt: details.addressSalt,
   130→      compiledConstructorCalldata,
   131→      version: details.version,
   132→      nonceDataAvailabilityMode: details.nonceDataAvailabilityMode === "L1" ? EDAMode.L1 : EDAMode.L2,
   133→      feeDataAvailabilityMode: details.feeDataAvailabilityMode === "L1" ? EDAMode.L1 : EDAMode.L2,
   134→    })
   135→    return this._sign(txHash)
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  _sign(txHash) {
   139→    console.log(`  Signing ${txHash.slice(0, 18)}...`)
   140→    return falcon.sign_for_starknet(this.sk, txHash, this.pkNtt)
   141→  }
   142→}
   143→
   144→// --- Main ---
   145→
   146→async function main() {
   147→  console.log("=== Falcon-512 E2E Deploy ===\n")
   148→  console.log(`  RPC:        ${RPC_URL}`)
   149→  console.log(`  ClassHash:  ${CLASS_HASH}`)
   150→  console.log(`  WASM:       ${WASM_PATH}\n`)
   151→
   152→  // 1. Keygen
   153→  console.log("1. Generating keypair...")
   154→  const seed = new Uint8Array(32)
   155→  for (let i = 0; i < 32; i++) seed[i] = i + 1
   156→  const { sk, vk } = falcon.keygen(seed)
   157→  console.log(`   SK: ${sk.length} bytes, VK: ${vk.length} bytes`)
   158→
   159→  // 2. NTT + pack public key
   160→  console.log("2. NTT-transforming and packing public key...")
   161→  const pkTime = parsePublicKey(vk)
   162→  const pkNtt = new Int32Array(falcon.ntt_public_key(pkTime))
   163→  const packedSlots = falcon.pack_public_key_wasm(toUint16(pkNtt))
   164→  console.log(`   ${packedSlots.length} packed felt252 slots`)
   165→
   166→  // 3. Compute address
   167→  console.log("3. Computing deploy address...")
   168→  const constructorCalldata = [...packedSlots]
   169→  const salt = stark.randomAddress()
   170→  const address = hash.calculateContractAddressFromHash(salt, CLASS_HASH, constructorCalldata, 0)
   171→  console.log(`   Address: ${address}`)
   172→
   173→  // 4. Fund
   174→  console.log("4. Minting STRK...")
   175→  await mintFunds(address, 10000000000000000000, "FRI")
   176→  const balance = await getBalance(address)
   177→  console.log(`   Balance: ${Number(balance) / 1e18} STRK`)
   178→
   179→  // 5. Deploy
   180→  console.log("5. Deploying account...")
   181→  const signer = new FalconSigner(sk, pkNtt)
   182→  const account = new Account({ provider, address, signer })
   183→
   184→  const deployResult = await account.deployAccount(
   185→    {
   186→      classHash: CLASS_HASH,
   187→      constructorCalldata,
   188→      addressSalt: salt,
   189→      contractAddress: address,
   190→    },
   191→    { resourceBounds: RESOURCE_BOUNDS },
   192→  )
   193→  console.log(`   Deploy tx: ${deployResult.transaction_hash}`)
   194→  await provider.waitForTransaction(deployResult.transaction_hash)
   195→  console.log("   Confirmed!")
   196→
   197→  // 6. Transfer
   198→  console.log("6. Sending STRK transfer...")
   199→  const STRK_TOKEN = "0x04718f5a0fc34cc1af16a1cdee98ffb20c31f5cd61d6ab07201858f4287c938d"
   200→  const recipient = "0x064b48806902a367c8598f4f95c305e8c1a1acba5f082d294a43793113115691"
   201→  const transferAmount = 1000000000000000n
   202→
   203→  const txResult = await account.execute(
   204→    [{
   205→      contractAddress: STRK_TOKEN,
   206→      entrypoint: "transfer",
   207→      calldata: CallData.compile({ recipient, amount: { low: transferAmount, high: 0n } }),
   208→    }],
   209→    { resourceBounds: RESOURCE_BOUNDS },
   210→  )
   211→  console.log(`   Transfer tx: ${txResult.transaction_hash}`)
   212→  await provider.waitForTransaction(txResult.transaction_hash)
   213→
   214→  const balanceAfter = await getBalance(address)
   215→  console.log(`   Balance after: ${Number(balanceAfter) / 1e18} STRK`)
   216→
   217→  console.log("\n=== E2E PASSED ===")
   218→}
   219→
   220→main().catch((e) => {
   221→  console.error("\nFATAL:", e.message || e)
   222→  process.exit(1)
   223→})
   224→

1→import { Config, Effect, Layer } from "effect"
     2→import { RpcProvider, Account, hash, stark } from "starknet"
     3→import type { SignerInterface } from "starknet"
     4→import {
     5→  StarknetRpcError,
     6→  AccountDeployError,
     7→  DevnetFetchError,
     8→  TransactionSubmitError,
     9→} from "./errors"
    10→import { TxHash, ContractAddress } from "./types"
    11→import type { PackedPublicKey, DevnetAccount } from "./types"
    12→
    13→/** STRK token contract address (same on mainnet and Sepolia) */
    14→export const STRK_TOKEN_ADDRESS =
    15→  "0x04718f5a0fc34cc1af16a1cdee98ffb20c31f5cd61d6ab07201858f4287c938d"
    16→
    17→export function parsePrefundedAccounts(raw: unknown[]): DevnetAccount[] {
    18→  return raw
    19→    .filter((item): item is Record<string, string> =>
    20→      typeof item === "object" && item !== null &&
    21→      "address" in item && "private_key" in item
    22→    )
    23→    .map((item) => ({
    24→      address: item.address,
    25→      private_key: item.private_key,
    26→      initial_balance: item.initial_balance ?? "0",
    27→    }))
    28→}
    29→
    30→function makeService(rpcUrl: string, classHash: string) {
    31→  const provider = new RpcProvider({ nodeUrl: rpcUrl })
    32→
    33→  const computeDeployAddress = Effect.fn("Starknet.computeDeployAddress")(
    34→    function* (packedPk: PackedPublicKey) {
    35→      // PackedPolynomial512 is a flat struct (s0..s28), not an Array.
    36→      // CallData.compile would add a length prefix; pass raw slots instead.
    37→      const constructorCalldata = [...packedPk.slots]
    38→      const salt = stark.randomAddress()
    39→      const address = hash.calculateContractAddressFromHash(
    40→        salt,
    41→        classHash,
    42→        constructorCalldata,
    43→        0,
    44→      )
    45→      return {
    46→        address: ContractAddress.make(address),
    47→        salt,
    48→      }
    49→    },
    50→  )
    51→
    52→  const getBalance = Effect.fn("Starknet.getBalance")(
    53→    function* (address: string) {
    54→      return yield* Effect.tryPromise({
    55→        try: async () => {
    56→          const result = await provider.callContract({
    57→            contractAddress: STRK_TOKEN_ADDRESS,
    58→            entrypoint: "balanceOf",
    59→            calldata: [address],
    60→          })
    61→          return BigInt(result[0])
    62→        },
    63→        catch: (error) =>
    64→          new StarknetRpcError({ message: String(error), code: -1 }),
    65→      })
    66→    },
    67→  )
    68→
    69→  const deployAccount = Effect.fn("Starknet.deployAccount")(
    70→    function* (
    71→      packedPk: PackedPublicKey,
    72→      signer: SignerInterface,
    73→      salt: string,
    74→    ) {
    75→      // PackedPolynomial512 is a flat struct (s0..s28), not an Array.
    76→      // CallData.compile would add a length prefix; pass raw slots instead.
    77→      const constructorCalldata = [...packedPk.slots]
    78→      const address = hash.calculateContractAddressFromHash(
    79→        salt,
    80→        classHash,
    81→        constructorCalldata,
    82→        0,
    83→      )
    84→
    85→      const account = new Account({ provider, address, signer })
    86→
    87→      const result = yield* Effect.tryPromise({
    88→        try: () =>
    89→          account.deployAccount(
    90→            {
    91→              classHash,
    92→              constructorCalldata,
    93→              addressSalt: salt,
    94→              contractAddress: address,
    95→            },
    96→            {
    97→              // Falcon-512 verification is ~63K steps (~13.2M L2 gas).
    98→              // Auto-estimation often fails for compute-heavy contracts,
    99→              // so we set explicit resource bounds.
   100→              resourceBounds: {
   101→                l2_gas: { max_amount: 0x2FAF080n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
   102→                l1_gas: { max_amount: 0x0n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
   103→                l1_data_gas: { max_amount: 0x3000n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
   104→              },
   105→            },
   106→          ),
   107→        catch: (error) =>
   108→          new AccountDeployError({ message: String(error) }),
   109→      })
   110→
   111→      yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   112→        try: () => provider.waitForTransaction(result.transaction_hash),
   113→        catch: (error) =>
   114→          new AccountDeployError({
   115→            message: `Tx failed: ${error}`,
   116→            txHash: result.transaction_hash,
   117→          }),
   118→      })
   119→
   120→      return {
   121→        txHash: TxHash.make(result.transaction_hash),
   122→        address: ContractAddress.make(result.contract_address),
   123→      }
   124→    },
   125→  )
   126→
   127→  const waitForTx = Effect.fn("Starknet.waitForTx")(
   128→    function* (txHash: string) {
   129→      yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   130→        try: () => provider.waitForTransaction(txHash),
   131→        catch: (error) =>
   132→          new StarknetRpcError({ message: String(error), code: -1 }),
   133→      })
   134→    },
   135→  )
   136→
   137→  const fetchPrefundedAccounts = Effect.fn("Starknet.fetchPrefundedAccounts")(
   138→    function* () {
   139→      return yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   140→        try: async () => {
   141→          const baseUrl = rpcUrl.replace(/\/rpc.*$/, "").replace(/\/$/, "")
   142→          const response = await fetch(baseUrl, {
   143→            method: "POST",
   144→            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   145→            body: JSON.stringify({
   146→              jsonrpc: "2.0",
   147→              id: 1,
   148→              method: "devnet_getPredeployedAccounts",
   149→              params: [],
   150→            }),
   151→          })
   152→          if (!response.ok) {
   153→            throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`)
   154→          }
   155→          const json = await response.json()
   156→          if (json.error) {
   157→            throw new Error(json.error.message ?? JSON.stringify(json.error))
   158→          }
   159→          return parsePrefundedAccounts(json.result as unknown[])
   160→        },
   161→        catch: (error) =>
   162→          new DevnetFetchError({ message: `Failed to fetch prefunded accounts: ${error}` }),
   163→      })
   164→    },
   165→  )
   166→
   167→  const sendTransaction = Effect.fn("Starknet.sendTransaction")(
   168→    function* (
   169→      accountAddress: string,
   170→      signer: SignerInterface,
   171→      recipient: string,
   172→      amount: bigint,
   173→    ) {
   174→      const account = new Account({ provider, address: accountAddress, signer })
   175→      return yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   176→        try: async () => {
   177→          const result = await account.execute([
   178→            {
   179→              contractAddress: STRK_TOKEN_ADDRESS,
   180→              entrypoint: "transfer",
   181→              calldata: [recipient, amount.toString(), "0"],
   182→            },
   183→          ])
   184→          await provider.waitForTransaction(result.transaction_hash)
   185→          return { txHash: TxHash.make(result.transaction_hash) }
   186→        },
   187→        catch: (error) =>
   188→          new TransactionSubmitError({ message: String(error) }),
   189→      })
   190→    },
   191→  )
   192→
   193→  return {
   194→    computeDeployAddress,
   195→    getBalance,
   196→    deployAccount,
   197→    waitForTx,
   198→    fetchPrefundedAccounts,
   199→    sendTransaction,
   200→    provider,
   201→  }
   202→}
   203→
   204→// @ts-ignore — StarknetService.make() intentionally overrides the inherited Effect.Service.make() with a Layer factory
   205→export class StarknetService extends Effect.Service<StarknetService>()(
   206→  "StarknetService",
   207→  {
   208→    accessors: true,
   209→    effect: Effect.gen(function* () {
   210→      const rpcUrl = yield* Config.string("NEXT_PUBLIC_STARKNET_RPC_URL")
   211→      return makeService(rpcUrl, "0x0")
   212→    }),
   213→  },
   214→) {
   215→  /**
   216→   * Custom layer factory for runtime network switching.
   217→   * Use this instead of Default when you need a specific rpcUrl and classHash
   218→   * (e.g., switching between Sepolia and Mainnet at runtime).
   219→   */
   220→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
   221→  static make(rpcUrl: string, classHash: string): Layer.Layer<StarknetService> {
   222→    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
   223→    return Layer.succeed(StarknetService, makeService(rpcUrl, classHash) as any)
   224→  }
   225→}
   226→

1→import { describe, it, expect } from "bun:test"
     2→import { Layer, ManagedRuntime } from "effect"
     3→import { FalconSigner } from "../../services/FalconSigner"
     4→import { FalconService } from "../../services/FalconService"
     5→import { WasmRuntime } from "../../services/WasmRuntime"
     6→import type { WasmModule } from "../../services/WasmRuntime"
     7→
     8→const MOCK_SIGNATURE = Array.from({ length: 61 }, (_, i) => `0x${i.toString(16)}`)
     9→
    10→const mockWasm: WasmModule = {
    11→  keygen: () => ({ sk: new Uint8Array(1281), vk: new Uint8Array(896) }),
    12→  sign: () => ({ signature: new Uint8Array(666), salt: new Uint8Array(40) }),
    13→  verify: () => true,
    14→  create_verification_hint: () => new Uint16Array(512),
    15→  pack_public_key_wasm: () => Array.from({ length: 29 }, () => "0x0"),
    16→  public_key_length: () => 896,
    17→  salt_length: () => 40,
    18→  sign_for_starknet: () => MOCK_SIGNATURE,
    19→}
    20→
    21→const falconRuntime = ManagedRuntime.make(
    22→  FalconService.Default.pipe(
    23→    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(WasmRuntime, mockWasm)),
    24→  ),
    25→)
    26→
    27→const V3_DETAILS = {
    28→  walletAddress: "0x1",
    29→  chainId: "0x534e5f5345504f4c4941" as const,
    30→  version: "0x3" as const,
    31→  cairoVersion: "1" as const,
    32→  nonce: "0x0",
    33→  resourceBounds: {
    34→    l1_gas: { max_amount: 0n, max_price_per_unit: 0n },
    35→    l2_gas: { max_amount: 0n, max_price_per_unit: 0n },
    36→    l1_data_gas: { max_amount: 0n, max_price_per_unit: 0n },
    37→  },
    38→  tip: 0n,
    39→  paymasterData: [],
    40→  accountDeploymentData: [],
    41→  nonceDataAvailabilityMode: "L1" as const,
    42→  feeDataAvailabilityMode: "L1" as const,
    43→}
    44→
    45→describe("FalconSigner", () => {
    46→  it("implements signTransaction and returns string[]", async () => {
    47→    const signer = new FalconSigner(
    48→      new Uint8Array(1281),
    49→      new Int32Array(512),
    50→      falconRuntime,
    51→    )
    52→
    53→    const sig = await signer.signTransaction(
    54→      [{ contractAddress: "0x1", entrypoint: "transfer", calldata: [] }],
    55→      V3_DETAILS,
    56→    )
    57→
    58→    const sigArray = sig as string[]
    59→    expect(Array.isArray(sigArray)).toBe(true)
    60→    expect(sigArray.length).toBe(61)
    61→    expect(sigArray[0]).toBe("0x0")
    62→  })
    63→
    64→  it("getPubKey returns placeholder", async () => {
    65→    const signer = new FalconSigner(
    66→      new Uint8Array(1281),
    67→      new Int32Array(512),
    68→      falconRuntime,
    69→    )
    70→
    71→    expect(await signer.getPubKey()).toBe("0x0")
    72→  })
    73→})
    74→

1→import { Effect, Option, Schema } from "effect"
     2→import type { SignerInterface } from "starknet"
     3→import { FalconService } from "@/services/FalconService"
     4→import { StarknetService } from "@/services/StarknetService"
     5→import { InsufficientFundsError } from "@/services/errors"
     6→import type {
     7→  ContractAddress,
     8→  FalconKeypair,
     9→  PackedPublicKey,
    10→} from "@/services/types"
    11→
    12→const FALCON_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH = 512
    13→const FALCON_MODULUS = 12289
    14→
    15→export class InvalidPrivateKeyError extends Schema.TaggedError<InvalidPrivateKeyError>()(
    16→  "InvalidPrivateKeyError",
    17→  { message: Schema.String },
    18→) {}
    19→
    20→export class InvalidPublicKeyNttError extends Schema.TaggedError<InvalidPublicKeyNttError>()(
    21→  "InvalidPublicKeyNttError",
    22→  { message: Schema.String },
    23→) {}
    24→
    25→export interface PreparedAccountDeploy {
    26→  readonly privateKey: string
    27→  readonly keypair: FalconKeypair
    28→  readonly packedPublicKey: PackedPublicKey
    29→  readonly address: ContractAddress
    30→  readonly salt: string
    31→}
    32→
    33→export interface DeployAccountInput {
    34→  readonly address: ContractAddress
    35→  readonly packedPublicKey: PackedPublicKey
    36→  readonly signer: SignerInterface
    37→  readonly salt: string
    38→  readonly requiredBalance: bigint
    39→}
    40→
    41→export const validateHexPrivateKey = Effect.fn(
    42→  "AccountDeployPipeline.validateHexPrivateKey",
    43→)((privateKey: string) =>
    44→  Effect.try({
    45→    try: () => {
    46→      const trimmed = privateKey.trim()
    47→      const normalized = trimmed.toLowerCase()
    48→
    49→      if (!normalized.startsWith("0x")) {
    50→        throw new Error("Private key must be 0x-prefixed")
    51→      }
    52→
    53→      const hexBody = normalized.slice(2)
    54→      if (hexBody.length === 0 || hexBody.length > 64) {
    55→        throw new Error("Private key must be between 1 and 32 bytes hex")
    56→      }
    57→
    58→      if (!/^[0-9a-f]+$/u.test(hexBody)) {
    59→        throw new Error("Private key contains non-hex characters")
    60→      }
    61→
    62→      // Pad to 32 bytes for consistency (Starknet private keys may be shorter)
    63→      return `0x${hexBody.padStart(64, "0")}`
    64→    },
    65→    catch: (error) =>
    66→      new InvalidPrivateKeyError({
    67→        message: String(error),
    68→      }),
    69→  }),
    70→)
    71→
    72→export const toUint16PublicKeyNtt = Effect.fn(
    73→  "AccountDeployPipeline.toUint16PublicKeyNtt",
    74→)((publicKeyNtt: Int32Array) =>
    75→  Effect.try({
    76→    try: () => {
    77→      if (publicKeyNtt.length !== FALCON_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH) {
    78→        throw new Error(
    79→          `publicKeyNtt must have ${FALCON_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH} coefficients`,
    80→        )
    81→      }
    82→
    83→      const packed = new Uint16Array(FALCON_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH)
    84→      for (let i = 0; i < publicKeyNtt.length; i += 1) {
    85→        const coeff = publicKeyNtt[i]
    86→        if (coeff < 0 || coeff >= FALCON_MODULUS) {
    87→          throw new Error(`publicKeyNtt coefficient out of range at index ${i}`)
    88→        }
    89→        packed[i] = coeff
    90→      }
    91→
    92→      return packed
    93→    },
    94→    catch: (error) =>
    95→      new InvalidPublicKeyNttError({
    96→        message: String(error),
    97→      }),
    98→  }),
    99→)
   100→
   101→interface PrepareAccountDeployInput {
   102→  readonly privateKey: string
   103→  readonly existingKeypair: Option.Option<FalconKeypair>
   104→}
   105→
   106→export const prepareAccountDeployEffect = Effect.fn(
   107→  "AccountDeployPipeline.prepareAccountDeployEffect",
   108→)(function* ({ privateKey, existingKeypair }: PrepareAccountDeployInput) {
   109→  // Validate deployer private key only if provided (devnet auto-fills it;
   110→  // on public networks the Falcon account self-deploys so it's not needed).
   111→  const normalizedPrivateKey = privateKey.trim().length > 0
   112→    ? yield* validateHexPrivateKey(privateKey)
   113→    : ""
   114→
   115→  const keypair = yield* Option.match(existingKeypair, {
   116→    onNone: () => FalconService.generateKeypair(),
   117→    onSome: (currentKeypair) => Effect.succeed(currentKeypair),
   118→  })
   119→
   120→  const publicKeyNtt = yield* toUint16PublicKeyNtt(keypair.publicKeyNtt)
   121→  const packedPublicKey = yield* FalconService.packPublicKey(publicKeyNtt)
   122→  const { address, salt } = yield* StarknetService.computeDeployAddress(packedPublicKey)
   123→
   124→  return {
   125→    privateKey: normalizedPrivateKey,
   126→    keypair,
   127→    packedPublicKey,
   128→    address,
   129→    salt,
   130→  } satisfies PreparedAccountDeploy
   131→})
   132→
   133→export const deployAccountEffect = Effect.fn(
   134→  "AccountDeployPipeline.deployAccountEffect",
   135→)(function* ({
   136→  address,
   137→  packedPublicKey,
   138→  signer,
   139→  salt,
   140→  requiredBalance,
   141→}: DeployAccountInput) {
   142→  const balance = yield* StarknetService.getBalance(address)
   143→
   144→  if (balance < requiredBalance) {
   145→    return yield* Effect.fail(
   146→      new InsufficientFundsError({
   147→        message: "Insufficient STRK balance. Fund the account and try again.",
   148→        address,
   149→        required: requiredBalance.toString(),
   150→      }),
   151→    )
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  const deployment = yield* StarknetService.deployAccount(
   155→    packedPublicKey,
   156→    signer,
   157→    salt,
   158→  )
   159→
   160→  return deployment
   161→})
   162→

1→#!/usr/bin/env node
     2→/**
     3→ * Deploy a Falcon-512 account on Starknet and send a test transfer.
     4→ *
     5→ * Environment variables:
     6→ *   CLASS_HASH        — declared FalconAccount class hash (required)
     7→ *   FALCON_WASM_PATH  — path to Node.js WASM package (default: bin/.wasm-nodejs)
     8→ *   RPC_URL           — JSON-RPC endpoint (default: http://localhost:5050/rpc)
     9→ */
    10→
    11→import { createRequire } from "module"
    12→import { dirname, resolve } from "path"
    13→import { fileURLToPath } from "url"
    14→import {
    15→  RpcProvider, Account, hash, stark, CallData, SignerInterface,
    16→  transaction, EDAMode,
    17→} from "../apps/demo/node_modules/starknet/dist/index.mjs"
    18→
    19→const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url))
    20→
    21→// --- Config ---
    22→const CLASS_HASH = process.env.CLASS_HASH
    23→if (!CLASS_HASH) {
    24→  console.error("ERROR: CLASS_HASH env var is required")
    25→  process.exit(1)
    26→}
    27→const RPC_URL = process.env.RPC_URL || "http://localhost:5050/rpc"
    28→const WASM_PATH = resolve(process.env.FALCON_WASM_PATH || `${__dirname}/.wasm-nodejs`)
    29→
    30→const require = createRequire(import.meta.url)
    31→const falcon = require(resolve(WASM_PATH, "falcon_rs.js"))
    32→
    33→const provider = new RpcProvider({ nodeUrl: RPC_URL })
    34→
    35→// --- Helpers ---
    36→
    37→/** Deserialize 896-byte VK into 512 time-domain Int32Array coefficients */
    38→function parsePublicKey(vkBytes) {
    39→  const Q = 12289, N = 512, BITS = 14
    40→  const coeffs = new Int32Array(N)
    41→  const mask = (1 << BITS) - 1
    42→  let bitBuffer = 0, bitsInBuffer = 0, byteIndex = 0
    43→  for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
    44→    while (bitsInBuffer < BITS) {
    45→      bitBuffer |= vkBytes[byteIndex++] << bitsInBuffer
    46→      bitsInBuffer += 8
    47→    }
    48→    const coeff = bitBuffer & mask
    49→    bitBuffer >>= BITS
    50→    bitsInBuffer -= BITS
    51→    if (coeff >= Q) throw new Error(`Invalid VK coeff ${coeff} at ${i}`)
    52→    coeffs[i] = coeff
    53→  }
    54→  return coeffs
    55→}
    56→
    57→/** Convert Int32Array to Uint16Array for pack_public_key_wasm */
    58→function toUint16(arr) {
    59→  const u16 = new Uint16Array(arr.length)
    60→  for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) u16[i] = arr[i]
    61→  return u16
    62→}
    63→
    64→/** Fund an address via devnet JSON-RPC mint */
    65→async function mintFunds(address, amount, unit) {
    66→  const baseUrl = RPC_URL.replace(/\/rpc.*$/, "")
    67→  const resp = await fetch(baseUrl, {
    68→    method: "POST",
    69→    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    70→    body: JSON.stringify({
    71→      jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1,
    72→      method: "devnet_mint",
    73→      params: { address, amount, unit },
    74→    }),
    75→  })
    76→  if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`Mint failed: ${resp.status} ${await resp.text()}`)
    77→  const json = await resp.json()
    78→  if (json.error) throw new Error(`Mint error: ${JSON.stringify(json.error)}`)
    79→  return json.result
    80→}
    81→
    82→/** Get STRK balance of an address */
    83→async function getBalance(address) {
    84→  const STRK = "0x04718f5a0fc34cc1af16a1cdee98ffb20c31f5cd61d6ab07201858f4287c938d"
    85→  const result = await provider.callContract({
    86→    contractAddress: STRK,
    87→    entrypoint: "balanceOf",
    88→    calldata: [address],
    89→  })
    90→  return BigInt(result[0])
    91→}
    92→
    93→// --- Falcon Signer ---
    94→
    95→const RESOURCE_BOUNDS = {
    96→  l2_gas: { max_amount: 0x2FAF080n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
    97→  l1_gas: { max_amount: 0x0n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
    98→  l1_data_gas: { max_amount: 0x3000n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
    99→}
   100→
   101→class FalconSigner extends SignerInterface {
   102→  constructor(sk, pkNtt) {
   103→    super()
   104→    this.sk = sk
   105→    this.pkNtt = pkNtt
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  async getPubKey() { return "0x0" }
   109→  async signMessage() { throw new Error("signMessage not implemented") }
   110→  async signDeclareTransaction() { throw new Error("signDeclareTransaction not implemented") }
   111→
   112→  async signTransaction(transactions, details) {
   113→    const compiledCalldata = transaction.getExecuteCalldata(transactions, details.cairoVersion)
   114→    const txHash = hash.calculateInvokeTransactionHash({
   115→      ...details,
   116→      senderAddress: details.walletAddress,
   117→      compiledCalldata,
   118→      version: details.version,
   119→      nonceDataAvailabilityMode: details.nonceDataAvailabilityMode === "L1" ? EDAMode.L1 : EDAMode.L2,
   120→      feeDataAvailabilityMode: details.feeDataAvailabilityMode === "L1" ? EDAMode.L1 : EDAMode.L2,
   121→    })
   122→    return this._sign(txHash)
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  async signDeployAccountTransaction(details) {
   126→    const compiledConstructorCalldata = CallData.compile(details.constructorCalldata)
   127→    const txHash = hash.calculateDeployAccountTransactionHash({
   128→      ...details,
   129→      salt: details.addressSalt,
   130→      compiledConstructorCalldata,
   131→      version: details.version,
   132→      nonceDataAvailabilityMode: details.nonceDataAvailabilityMode === "L1" ? EDAMode.L1 : EDAMode.L2,
   133→      feeDataAvailabilityMode: details.feeDataAvailabilityMode === "L1" ? EDAMode.L1 : EDAMode.L2,
   134→    })
   135→    return this._sign(txHash)
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  _sign(txHash) {
   139→    console.log(`  Signing ${txHash.slice(0, 18)}...`)
   140→    return falcon.sign_for_starknet(this.sk, txHash, this.pkNtt)
   141→  }
   142→}
   143→
   144→// --- Main ---
   145→
   146→async function main() {
   147→  console.log("=== Falcon-512 E2E Deploy ===\n")
   148→  console.log(`  RPC:        ${RPC_URL}`)
   149→  console.log(`  ClassHash:  ${CLASS_HASH}`)
   150→  console.log(`  WASM:       ${WASM_PATH}\n`)
   151→
   152→  // 1. Keygen
   153→  console.log("1. Generating keypair...")
   154→  const seed = new Uint8Array(32)
   155→  for (let i = 0; i < 32; i++) seed[i] = i + 1
   156→  const { sk, vk } = falcon.keygen(seed)
   157→  console.log(`   SK: ${sk.length} bytes, VK: ${vk.length} bytes`)
   158→
   159→  // 2. NTT + pack public key
   160→  console.log("2. NTT-transforming and packing public key...")
   161→  const pkTime = parsePublicKey(vk)
   162→  const pkNtt = new Int32Array(falcon.ntt_public_key(pkTime))
   163→  const packedSlots = falcon.pack_public_key_wasm(toUint16(pkNtt))
   164→  console.log(`   ${packedSlots.length} packed felt252 slots`)
   165→
   166→  // 3. Compute address
   167→  console.log("3. Computing deploy address...")
   168→  const constructorCalldata = [...packedSlots]
   169→  const salt = stark.randomAddress()
   170→  const address = hash.calculateContractAddressFromHash(salt, CLASS_HASH, constructorCalldata, 0)
   171→  console.log(`   Address: ${address}`)
   172→
   173→  // 4. Fund
   174→  console.log("4. Minting STRK...")
   175→  await mintFunds(address, 10000000000000000000, "FRI")
   176→  const balance = await getBalance(address)
   177→  console.log(`   Balance: ${Number(balance) / 1e18} STRK`)
   178→
   179→  // 5. Deploy
   180→  console.log("5. Deploying account...")
   181→  const signer = new FalconSigner(sk, pkNtt)
   182→  const account = new Account({ provider, address, signer })
   183→
   184→  const deployResult = await account.deployAccount(
   185→    {
   186→      classHash: CLASS_HASH,
   187→      constructorCalldata,
   188→      addressSalt: salt,
   189→      contractAddress: address,
   190→    },
   191→    { resourceBounds: RESOURCE_BOUNDS },
   192→  )
   193→  console.log(`   Deploy tx: ${deployResult.transaction_hash}`)
   194→  await provider.waitForTransaction(deployResult.transaction_hash)
   195→  console.log("   Confirmed!")
   196→
   197→  // 6. Transfer
   198→  console.log("6. Sending STRK transfer...")
   199→  const STRK_TOKEN = "0x04718f5a0fc34cc1af16a1cdee98ffb20c31f5cd61d6ab07201858f4287c938d"
   200→  const recipient = "0x064b48806902a367c8598f4f95c305e8c1a1acba5f082d294a43793113115691"
   201→  const transferAmount = 1000000000000000n
   202→
   203→  const txResult = await account.execute(
   204→    [{
   205→      contractAddress: STRK_TOKEN,
   206→      entrypoint: "transfer",
   207→      calldata: CallData.compile({ recipient, amount: { low: transferAmount, high: 0n } }),
   208→    }],
   209→    { resourceBounds: RESOURCE_BOUNDS },
   210→  )
   211→  console.log(`   Transfer tx: ${txResult.transaction_hash}`)
   212→  await provider.waitForTransaction(txResult.transaction_hash)
   213→
   214→  const balanceAfter = await getBalance(address)
   215→  console.log(`   Balance after: ${Number(balanceAfter) / 1e18} STRK`)
   216→
   217→  console.log("\n=== E2E PASSED ===")
   218→}
   219→
   220→main().catch((e) => {
   221→  console.error("\nFATAL:", e.message || e)
   222→  process.exit(1)
   223→})
   224→

1. In `bin/e2e-deploy.mjs` - how `salt` is generated (is it random or fixed?) and how `calculateContractAddressFromHash` is called
2. In the demo app (`apps/demo/`) - how the webapp computes the deploy address. Search for `calculateContractAddressFromHash`, `salt`, `randomAddress`, address computation
3. How `sncast account create` stores accounts - check the account file at `~/.starknet_accounts/starknet_open_zeppelin_accounts.json` for the sepolia-deployer entry (just show the structure, salt, address fields - no private keys)
4. The relationship between salt, class_hash, constructor_calldata and the resulting address - is it fully deterministic? If the same seed is used for keygen, will the same public key be produced, and with the same salt, the same address?

Return relevant code snippets and explain the determinism.

content.content:
1→import { Config, Effect, Layer } from "effect"
     2→import { RpcProvider, Account, hash, stark } from "starknet"
     3→import type { SignerInterface } from "starknet"
     4→import {
     5→  StarknetRpcError,
     6→  AccountDeployError,
     7→  DevnetFetchError,
     8→  TransactionSubmitError,
     9→} from "./errors"
    10→import { TxHash, ContractAddress } from "./types"
    11→import type { PackedPublicKey, DevnetAccount } from "./types"
    12→
    13→/** STRK token contract address (same on mainnet and Sepolia) */
    14→export const STRK_TOKEN_ADDRESS =
    15→  "0x04718f5a0fc34cc1af16a1cdee98ffb20c31f5cd61d6ab07201858f4287c938d"
    16→
    17→export function parsePrefundedAccounts(raw: unknown[]): DevnetAccount[] {
    18→  return raw
    19→    .filter((item): item is Record<string, string> =>
    20→      typeof item === "object" && item !== null &&
    21→      "address" in item && "private_key" in item
    22→    )
    23→    .map((item) => ({
    24→      address: item.address,
    25→      private_key: item.private_key,
    26→      initial_balance: item.initial_balance ?? "0",
    27→    }))
    28→}
    29→
    30→function makeService(rpcUrl: string, classHash: string) {
    31→  const provider = new RpcProvider({ nodeUrl: rpcUrl })
    32→
    33→  const computeDeployAddress = Effect.fn("Starknet.computeDeployAddress")(
    34→    function* (packedPk: PackedPublicKey) {
    35→      // PackedPolynomial512 is a flat struct (s0..s28), not an Array.
    36→      // CallData.compile would add a length prefix; pass raw slots instead.
    37→      const constructorCalldata = [...packedPk.slots]
    38→      const salt = stark.randomAddress()
    39→      const address = hash.calculateContractAddressFromHash(
    40→        salt,
    41→        classHash,
    42→        constructorCalldata,
    43→        0,
    44→      )
    45→      return {
    46→        address: ContractAddress.make(address),
    47→        salt,
    48→      }
    49→    },
    50→  )
    51→
    52→  const getBalance = Effect.fn("Starknet.getBalance")(
    53→    function* (address: string) {
    54→      return yield* Effect.tryPromise({
    55→        try: async () => {
    56→          const result = await provider.callContract({
    57→            contractAddress: STRK_TOKEN_ADDRESS,
    58→            entrypoint: "balanceOf",
    59→            calldata: [address],
    60→          })
    61→          return BigInt(result[0])
    62→        },
    63→        catch: (error) =>
    64→          new StarknetRpcError({ message: String(error), code: -1 }),
    65→      })
    66→    },
    67→  )
    68→
    69→  const deployAccount = Effect.fn("Starknet.deployAccount")(
    70→    function* (
    71→      packedPk: PackedPublicKey,
    72→      signer: SignerInterface,
    73→      salt: string,
    74→    ) {
    75→      // PackedPolynomial512 is a flat struct (s0..s28), not an Array.
    76→      // CallData.compile would add a length prefix; pass raw slots instead.
    77→      const constructorCalldata = [...packedPk.slots]
    78→      const address = hash.calculateContractAddressFromHash(
    79→        salt,
    80→        classHash,
    81→        constructorCalldata,
    82→        0,
    83→      )
    84→
    85→      const account = new Account({ provider, address, signer })
    86→
    87→      const result = yield* Effect.tryPromise({
    88→        try: () =>
    89→          account.deployAccount(
    90→            {
    91→              classHash,
    92→              constructorCalldata,
    93→              addressSalt: salt,
    94→              contractAddress: address,
    95→            },
    96→            {
    97→              // Falcon-512 verification is ~63K steps (~13.2M L2 gas).
    98→              // Auto-estimation often fails for compute-heavy contracts,
    99→              // so we set explicit resource bounds.
   100→              resourceBounds: {
   101→                l2_gas: { max_amount: 0x2FAF080n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
   102→                l1_gas: { max_amount: 0x0n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
   103→                l1_data_gas: { max_amount: 0x3000n, max_price_per_unit: 0x174876E800n },
   104→              },
   105→            },
   106→          ),
   107→        catch: (error) =>
   108→          new AccountDeployError({ message: String(error) }),
   109→      })
   110→
   111→      yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   112→        try: () => provider.waitForTransaction(result.transaction_hash),
   113→        catch: (error) =>
   114→          new AccountDeployError({
   115→            message: `Tx failed: ${error}`,
   116→            txHash: result.transaction_hash,
   117→          }),
   118→      })
   119→
   120→      return {
   121→        txHash: TxHash.make(result.transaction_hash),
   122→        address: ContractAddress.make(result.contract_address),
   123→      }
   124→    },
   125→  )
   126→
   127→  const waitForTx = Effect.fn("Starknet.waitForTx")(
   128→    function* (txHash: string) {
   129→      yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   130→        try: () => provider.waitForTransaction(txHash),
   131→        catch: (error) =>
   132→          new StarknetRpcError({ message: String(error), code: -1 }),
   133→      })
   134→    },
   135→  )
   136→
   137→  const fetchPrefundedAccounts = Effect.fn("Starknet.fetchPrefundedAccounts")(
   138→    function* () {
   139→      return yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   140→        try: async () => {
   141→          const baseUrl = rpcUrl.replace(/\/rpc.*$/, "").replace(/\/$/, "")
   142→          const response = await fetch(baseUrl, {
   143→            method: "POST",
   144→            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   145→            body: JSON.stringify({
   146→              jsonrpc: "2.0",
   147→              id: 1,
   148→              method: "devnet_getPredeployedAccounts",
   149→              params: [],
   150→            }),
   151→          })
   152→          if (!response.ok) {
   153→            throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`)
   154→          }
   155→          const json = await response.json()
   156→          if (json.error) {
   157→            throw new Error(json.error.message ?? JSON.stringify(json.error))
   158→          }
   159→          return parsePrefundedAccounts(json.result as unknown[])
   160→        },
   161→        catch: (error) =>
   162→          new DevnetFetchError({ message: `Failed to fetch prefunded accounts: ${error}` }),
   163→      })
   164→    },
   165→  )
   166→
   167→  const sendTransaction = Effect.fn("Starknet.sendTransaction")(
   168→    function* (
   169→      accountAddress: string,
   170→      signer: SignerInterface,
   171→      recipient: string,
   172→      amount: bigint,
   173→    ) {
   174→      const account = new Account({ provider, address: accountAddress, signer })
   175→      return yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   176→        try: async () => {
   177→          const result = await account.execute([
   178→            {
   179→              contractAddress: STRK_TOKEN_ADDRESS,
   180→              entrypoint: "transfer",
   181→              calldata: [recipient, amount.toString(), "0"],
   182→            },
   183→          ])
   184→          await provider.waitForTransaction(result.transaction_hash)
   185→          return { txHash: TxHash.make(result.transaction_hash) }
   186→        },
   187→        catch: (error) =>
   188→          new TransactionSubmitError({ message: String(error) }),
   189→      })
   190→    },
   191→  )
   192→
   193→  return {
   194→    computeDeployAddress,
   195→    getBalance,
   196→    deployAccount,
   197→    waitForTx,
   198→    fetchPrefundedAccounts,
   199→    sendTransaction,
   200→    provider,
   201→  }
   202→}
   203→
   204→// @ts-ignore — StarknetService.make() intentionally overrides the inherited Effect.Service.make() with a Layer factory
   205→export class StarknetService extends Effect.Service<StarknetService>()(
   206→  "StarknetService",
   207→  {
   208→    accessors: true,
   209→    effect: Effect.gen(function* () {
   210→      const rpcUrl = yield* Config.string("NEXT_PUBLIC_STARKNET_RPC_URL")
   211→      return makeService(rpcUrl, "0x0")
   212→    }),
   213→  },
   214→) {
   215→  /**
   216→   * Custom layer factory for runtime network switching.
   217→   * Use this instead of Default when you need a specific rpcUrl and classHash
   218→   * (e.g., switching between Sepolia and Mainnet at runtime).
   219→   */
   220→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
   221→  static make(rpcUrl: string, classHash: string): Layer.Layer<StarknetService> {
   222→    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
   223→    return Layer.succeed(StarknetService, makeService(rpcUrl, classHash) as any)
   224→  }
   225→}
   226→

1→import { Effect, Option, Schema } from "effect"
     2→import type { SignerInterface } from "starknet"
     3→import { FalconService } from "@/services/FalconService"
     4→import { StarknetService } from "@/services/StarknetService"
     5→import { InsufficientFundsError } from "@/services/errors"
     6→import type {
     7→  ContractAddress,
     8→  FalconKeypair,
     9→  PackedPublicKey,
    10→} from "@/services/types"
    11→
    12→const FALCON_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH = 512
    13→const FALCON_MODULUS = 12289
    14→
    15→export class InvalidPrivateKeyError extends Schema.TaggedError<InvalidPrivateKeyError>()(
    16→  "InvalidPrivateKeyError",
    17→  { message: Schema.String },
    18→) {}
    19→
    20→export class InvalidPublicKeyNttError extends Schema.TaggedError<InvalidPublicKeyNttError>()(
    21→  "InvalidPublicKeyNttError",
    22→  { message: Schema.String },
    23→) {}
    24→
    25→export interface PreparedAccountDeploy {
    26→  readonly privateKey: string
    27→  readonly keypair: FalconKeypair
    28→  readonly packedPublicKey: PackedPublicKey
    29→  readonly address: ContractAddress
    30→  readonly salt: string
    31→}
    32→
    33→export interface DeployAccountInput {
    34→  readonly address: ContractAddress
    35→  readonly packedPublicKey: PackedPublicKey
    36→  readonly signer: SignerInterface
    37→  readonly salt: string
    38→  readonly requiredBalance: bigint
    39→}
    40→
    41→export const validateHexPrivateKey = Effect.fn(
    42→  "AccountDeployPipeline.validateHexPrivateKey",
    43→)((privateKey: string) =>
    44→  Effect.try({
    45→    try: () => {
    46→      const trimmed = privateKey.trim()
    47→      const normalized = trimmed.toLowerCase()
    48→
    49→      if (!normalized.startsWith("0x")) {
    50→        throw new Error("Private key must be 0x-prefixed")
    51→      }
    52→
    53→      const hexBody = normalized.slice(2)
    54→      if (hexBody.length === 0 || hexBody.length > 64) {
    55→        throw new Error("Private key must be between 1 and 32 bytes hex")
    56→      }
    57→
    58→      if (!/^[0-9a-f]+$/u.test(hexBody)) {
    59→        throw new Error("Private key contains non-hex characters")
    60→      }
    61→
    62→      // Pad to 32 bytes for consistency (Starknet private keys may be shorter)
    63→      return `0x${hexBody.padStart(64, "0")}`
    64→    },
    65→    catch: (error) =>
    66→      new InvalidPrivateKeyError({
    67→        message: String(error),
    68→      }),
    69→  }),
    70→)
    71→
    72→export const toUint16PublicKeyNtt = Effect.fn(
    73→  "AccountDeployPipeline.toUint16PublicKeyNtt",
    74→)((publicKeyNtt: Int32Array) =>
    75→  Effect.try({
    76→    try: () => {
    77→      if (publicKeyNtt.length !== FALCON_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH) {
    78→        throw new Error(
    79→          `publicKeyNtt must have ${FALCON_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH} coefficients`,
    80→        )
    81→      }
    82→
    83→      const packed = new Uint16Array(FALCON_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH)
    84→      for (let i = 0; i < publicKeyNtt.length; i += 1) {
    85→        const coeff = publicKeyNtt[i]
    86→        if (coeff < 0 || coeff >= FALCON_MODULUS) {
    87→          throw new Error(`publicKeyNtt coefficient out of range at index ${i}`)
    88→        }
    89→        packed[i] = coeff
    90→      }
    91→
    92→      return packed
    93→    },
    94→    catch: (error) =>
    95→      new InvalidPublicKeyNttError({
    96→        message: String(error),
    97→      }),
    98→  }),
    99→)
   100→
   101→interface PrepareAccountDeployInput {
   102→  readonly privateKey: string
   103→  readonly existingKeypair: Option.Option<FalconKeypair>
   104→}
   105→
   106→export const prepareAccountDeployEffect = Effect.fn(
   107→  "AccountDeployPipeline.prepareAccountDeployEffect",
   108→)(function* ({ privateKey, existingKeypair }: PrepareAccountDeployInput) {
   109→  // Validate deployer private key only if provided (devnet auto-fills it;
   110→  // on public networks the Falcon account self-deploys so it's not needed).
   111→  const normalizedPrivateKey = privateKey.trim().length > 0
   112→    ? yield* validateHexPrivateKey(privateKey)
   113→    : ""
   114→
   115→  const keypair = yield* Option.match(existingKeypair, {
   116→    onNone: () => FalconService.generateKeypair(),
   117→    onSome: (currentKeypair) => Effect.succeed(currentKeypair),
   118→  })
   119→
   120→  const publicKeyNtt = yield* toUint16PublicKeyNtt(keypair.publicKeyNtt)
   121→  const packedPublicKey = yield* FalconService.packPublicKey(publicKeyNtt)
   122→  const { address, salt } = yield* StarknetService.computeDeployAddress(packedPublicKey)
   123→
   124→  return {
   125→    privateKey: normalizedPrivateKey,
   126→    keypair,
   127→    packedPublicKey,
   128→    address,
   129→    salt,
   130→  } satisfies PreparedAccountDeploy
   131→})
   132→
   133→export const deployAccountEffect = Effect.fn(
   134→  "AccountDeployPipeline.deployAccountEffect",
   135→)(function* ({
   136→  address,
   137→  packedPublicKey,
   138→  signer,
   139→  salt,
   140→  requiredBalance,
   141→}: DeployAccountInput) {
   142→  const balance = yield* StarknetService.getBalance(address)
   143→
   144→  if (balance < requiredBalance) {
   145→    return yield* Effect.fail(
   146→      new InsufficientFundsError({
   147→        message: "Insufficient STRK balance. Fund the account and try again.",
   148→        address,
   149→        required: requiredBalance.toString(),
   150→      }),
   151→    )
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  const deployment = yield* StarknetService.deployAccount(
   155→    packedPublicKey,
   156→    signer,
   157→    salt,
   158→  )
   159→
   160→  return deployment
   161→})
   162→

1→import { Cause, Exit, type ManagedRuntime, Option } from "effect"
     2→import {
     3→  type Call,
     4→  type InvocationsSignerDetails,
     5→  type DeployAccountSignerDetails,
     6→  type DeclareSignerDetails,
     7→  type Signature,
     8→  type TypedData,
     9→  SignerInterface,
    10→  hash,
    11→  transaction,
    12→  CallData,
    13→  EDAMode,
    14→  type EDataAvailabilityMode,
    15→  typedData as typedDataUtils,
    16→} from "starknet"
    17→import { FalconService } from "./FalconService"
    18→import { TransactionSignError } from "./errors"
    19→
    20→function intDAM(dam: EDataAvailabilityMode): EDAMode {
    21→  if (dam === "L1") return EDAMode.L1
    22→  if (dam === "L2") return EDAMode.L2
    23→  throw new Error(`Unknown EDataAvailabilityMode: ${dam}`)
    24→}
    25→
    26→export class FalconSigner extends SignerInterface {
    27→  constructor(
    28→    private readonly sk: Uint8Array,
    29→    private readonly pkNtt: Int32Array,
    30→    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    31→    private readonly runtime: ManagedRuntime.ManagedRuntime<FalconService, any>,
    32→  ) {
    33→    super()
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  async getPubKey(): Promise<string> {
    37→    // Falcon public keys are not a single felt — return a placeholder.
    38→    // The actual PK is the 29 packed felt252 slots stored in the contract.
    39→    return "0x0"
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  async signMessage(
    43→    typedDataObj: TypedData,
    44→    accountAddress: string,
    45→  ): Promise<Signature> {
    46→    const msgHash = typedDataUtils.getMessageHash(typedDataObj, accountAddress)
    47→    return this._signHash(msgHash)
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  async signTransaction(
    51→    transactions: Call[],
    52→    transactionsDetail: InvocationsSignerDetails,
    53→  ): Promise<Signature> {
    54→    const compiledCalldata = transaction.getExecuteCalldata(
    55→      transactions,
    56→      transactionsDetail.cairoVersion,
    57→    )
    58→    const txHash = hash.calculateInvokeTransactionHash({
    59→      ...transactionsDetail,
    60→      senderAddress: transactionsDetail.walletAddress,
    61→      compiledCalldata,
    62→      version: transactionsDetail.version,
    63→      nonceDataAvailabilityMode: intDAM(transactionsDetail.nonceDataAvailabilityMode),
    64→      feeDataAvailabilityMode: intDAM(transactionsDetail.feeDataAvailabilityMode),
    65→    })
    66→    return this._signHash(txHash)
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  async signDeployAccountTransaction(
    70→    details: DeployAccountSignerDetails,
    71→  ): Promise<Signature> {
    72→    const compiledConstructorCalldata = CallData.compile(
    73→      details.constructorCalldata,
    74→    )
    75→    const txHash = hash.calculateDeployAccountTransactionHash({
    76→      ...details,
    77→      salt: details.addressSalt,
    78→      compiledConstructorCalldata,
    79→      version: details.version,
    80→      nonceDataAvailabilityMode: intDAM(details.nonceDataAvailabilityMode),
    81→      feeDataAvailabilityMode: intDAM(details.feeDataAvailabilityMode),
    82→    })
    83→    return this._signHash(txHash)
    84→  }
    85→
    86→  async signDeclareTransaction(
    87→    details: DeclareSignerDetails,
    88→  ): Promise<Signature> {
    89→    const txHash = hash.calculateDeclareTransactionHash({
    90→      ...details,
    91→      version: details.version,
    92→      nonceDataAvailabilityMode: intDAM(details.nonceDataAvailabilityMode),
    93→      feeDataAvailabilityMode: intDAM(details.feeDataAvailabilityMode),
    94→    })
    95→    return this._signHash(txHash)
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  private async _signHash(txHash: string): Promise<string[]> {
    99→    const exit = await this.runtime.runPromiseExit(
   100→      FalconService.signForStarknet(this.sk, txHash, this.pkNtt),
   101→    )
   102→
   103→    if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {
   104→      console.log("[FalconSigner] txHash:", txHash)
   105→      console.log("[FalconSigner] sig length:", exit.value.length)
   106→      console.log("[FalconSigner] sig[28] (last s1):", exit.value[28])
   107→      console.log("[FalconSigner] sig[29] (salt_len):", exit.value[29])
   108→      console.log("[FalconSigner] sig[30] (salt[0]):", exit.value[30])
   109→      console.log("[FalconSigner] sig[31] (salt[1]):", exit.value[31])
   110→      console.log("[FalconSigner] sig[32] (first hint):", exit.value[32])
   111→      console.log("[FalconSigner] sig[60] (last hint):", exit.value[60])
   112→      return exit.value
   113→    }
   114→
   115→    const errOpt = Cause.failureOption(exit.cause)
   116→    const msg = Option.match(errOpt, {
   117→      onNone: () => "Falcon signing failed",
   118→      onSome: (e) => e.message,
   119→    })
   120→    throw new TransactionSignError({ message: msg })
   121→  }
   122→}
   123→

1→import { Effect } from "effect"
     2→import { WasmRuntime } from "./WasmRuntime"
     3→import {
     4→  KeygenError,
     5→  SigningError,
     6→  HintGenerationError,
     7→  PackingError,
     8→  VerificationError,
     9→} from "./errors"
    10→import type {
    11→  FalconKeypair,
    12→  FalconSignatureResult,
    13→  PackedPublicKey,
    14→} from "./types"
    15→
    16→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→// VK byte deserialization
    18→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19→
    20→/**
    21→ * Deserialize a Falcon-512 verifying key (896 bytes) into 512 time-domain
    22→ * coefficients stored as an Int32Array.
    23→ *
    24→ * NOTE: The VerifyingKey stores h in the TIME domain. Callers must NTT-transform
    25→ * the result (via wasm.ntt_public_key) before using it for verification or signing.
    26→ *
    27→ * Format (falcon-rs, PUBLIC_KEY_LEN = 896, no header):
    28→ *   - 512 coefficients x 14 bits each, packed LSB-first
    29→ *
    30→ * Algorithm: maintains a bit-buffer, loading bytes from the input one at a
    31→ * time and extracting 14-bit windows.
    32→ *
    33→ * Throws on invalid input (too few bytes, or any coefficient >= Q=12289).
    34→ */
    35→function parsePublicKeyTimeBytes(vkBytes: Uint8Array): Int32Array {
    36→  const Q = 12289
    37→  const N = 512
    38→  const BITS_PER_COEFF = 14
    39→  const DATA_BYTES = (N * BITS_PER_COEFF) / 8 // 896
    40→
    41→  if (vkBytes.length < DATA_BYTES) {
    42→    throw new Error(
    43→      `VK too short: expected at least ${DATA_BYTES} bytes, got ${vkBytes.length}`,
    44→    )
    45→  }
    46→
    47→  const coeffs = new Int32Array(N)
    48→  const mask = (1 << BITS_PER_COEFF) - 1 // 0x3FFF
    49→
    50→  let bitBuffer = 0
    51→  let bitsInBuffer = 0
    52→  let byteIndex = 0
    53→
    54→  for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
    55→    while (bitsInBuffer < BITS_PER_COEFF) {
    56→      bitBuffer |= vkBytes[byteIndex++] << bitsInBuffer
    57→      bitsInBuffer += 8
    58→    }
    59→    const coeff = bitBuffer & mask
    60→    bitBuffer >>= BITS_PER_COEFF
    61→    bitsInBuffer -= BITS_PER_COEFF
    62→
    63→    if (coeff >= Q) {
    64→      throw new Error(
    65→        `Invalid VK coefficient ${coeff} at index ${i} (must be < ${Q})`,
    66→      )
    67→    }
    68→    coeffs[i] = coeff
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  return coeffs
    72→}
    73→
    74→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    75→// FalconService
    76→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    77→
    78→export class FalconService extends Effect.Service<FalconService>()(
    79→  "FalconService",
    80→  {
    81→    accessors: true,
    82→    // No pre-bundled dependencies: callers must provide WasmRuntime via Layer.
    83→    // This enables unit tests to inject a mock WasmRuntime without the live
    84→    // loader trying to fetch /wasm/falcon_rs.js at import time.
    85→    effect: Effect.gen(function* () {
    86→      const wasm = yield* WasmRuntime
    87→
    88→      const generateKeypair = Effect.fn("Falcon.generateKeypair")(
    89→        function* (seed?: Uint8Array) {
    90→          const s =
    91→            seed ?? crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(32))
    92→          const result = yield* Effect.try({
    93→            try: () => wasm.keygen(s),
    94→            catch: (error) =>
    95→              new KeygenError({ message: String(error) }),
    96→          })
    97→          const publicKeyTime = yield* Effect.try({
    98→            try: () => parsePublicKeyTimeBytes(result.vk),
    99→            catch: (error) =>
   100→              new KeygenError({ message: String(error) }),
   101→          })
   102→          // Transform to NTT domain — required for Cairo verification and hint generation
   103→          const publicKeyNtt = yield* Effect.try({
   104→            try: () => new Int32Array(wasm.ntt_public_key(publicKeyTime)),
   105→            catch: (error) =>
   106→              new KeygenError({ message: `NTT transform failed: ${String(error)}` }),
   107→          })
   108→          return {
   109→            secretKey: result.sk,
   110→            verifyingKey: result.vk,
   111→            publicKeyNtt,
   112→          } satisfies FalconKeypair
   113→        },
   114→      )
   115→
   116→      const sign = Effect.fn("Falcon.sign")(
   117→        function* (
   118→          secretKey: Uint8Array,
   119→          message: Uint8Array,
   120→        ) {
   121→          const result = yield* Effect.try({
   122→            try: () =>
   123→              wasm.sign(secretKey, message, crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(40))),
   124→            catch: (error) =>
   125→              new SigningError({ message: String(error) }),
   126→          })
   127→          return result satisfies FalconSignatureResult
   128→        },
   129→      )
   130→
   131→      const verify = Effect.fn("Falcon.verify")(
   132→        function* (
   133→          verifyingKey: Uint8Array,
   134→          message: Uint8Array,
   135→          signature: Uint8Array,
   136→        ) {
   137→          return yield* Effect.try({
   138→            try: () => wasm.verify(verifyingKey, message, signature),
   139→            catch: (error) =>
   140→              new VerificationError({
   141→                message: String(error),
   142→                step: "verify",
   143→              }),
   144→          })
   145→        },
   146→      )
   147→
   148→      const createHint = Effect.fn("Falcon.createHint")(
   149→        function* (
   150→          s1: Int32Array,
   151→          pkNtt: Int32Array,
   152→        ) {
   153→          return yield* Effect.try({
   154→            try: () => wasm.create_verification_hint(s1, pkNtt),
   155→            catch: (error) =>
   156→              new HintGenerationError({ message: String(error) }),
   157→          })
   158→        },
   159→      )
   160→
   161→      const packPublicKey = Effect.fn("Falcon.packPublicKey")(
   162→        function* (
   163→          pkNtt: Uint16Array,
   164→        ) {
   165→          const slots = yield* Effect.try({
   166→            try: () => wasm.pack_public_key_wasm(pkNtt),
   167→            catch: (error) =>
   168→              new PackingError({ message: String(error) }),
   169→          })
   170→          return { slots } satisfies PackedPublicKey
   171→        },
   172→      )
   173→
   174→      const deserializePublicKeyNtt = Effect.fn(
   175→        "Falcon.deserializePublicKeyNtt",
   176→      )(function* (vkBytes: Uint8Array) {
   177→        const pkTime = yield* Effect.try({
   178→          try: () => parsePublicKeyTimeBytes(vkBytes),
   179→          catch: (error) =>
   180→            new KeygenError({ message: String(error) }),
   181→        })
   182→        return yield* Effect.try({
   183→          try: () => new Int32Array(wasm.ntt_public_key(pkTime)),
   184→          catch: (error) =>
   185→            new KeygenError({ message: `NTT transform failed: ${String(error)}` }),
   186→        })
   187→      })
   188→
   189→      const signForStarknet = Effect.fn("Falcon.signForStarknet")(
   190→        function* (
   191→          secretKey: Uint8Array,
   192→          txHash: string,
   193→          pkNtt: Int32Array,
   194→        ) {
   195→          return yield* Effect.try({
   196→            try: () => wasm.sign_for_starknet(secretKey, txHash, pkNtt),
   197→            catch: (error) =>
   198→              new SigningError({ message: String(error) }),
   199→          })
   200→        },
   201→      )
   202→
   203→      return {
   204→        generateKeypair,
   205→        sign,
   206→        verify,
   207→        createHint,
   208→        packPublicKey,
   209→        deserializePublicKeyNtt,
   210→        signForStarknet,
   211→      }
   212→    }),
   213→  },
   214→) {}
   215→

167→  const sendTransaction = Effect.fn("Starknet.sendTransaction")(
   168→    function* (
   169→      accountAddress: string,
   170→      signer: SignerInterface,
   171→      recipient: string,
   172→      amount: bigint,
   173→    ) {
   174→      const account = new Account({ provider, address: accountAddress, signer })
   175→      return yield* Effect.tryPromise({
   176→        try: async () => {
   177→          const result = await account.execute([
   178→            {
   179→              contractAddress: STRK_TOKEN_ADDRESS,
   180→              entrypoint: "transfer",
   181→              calldata: [recipient, amount.toString(), "0"],
   182→            },
   183→          ])
   184→          await provider.waitForTransaction(result.transaction_hash)
   185→          return { txHash: TxHash.make(result.transaction_hash) }
   186→        },
   187→        catch: (error) =>
   188→          new TransactionSubmitError({ message: String(error) }),
   189→      })
   190→    },
   191→  )

content.content:
1→import { describe, expect, it } from "bun:test"
     2→import { Cause, Effect, Exit, Layer, Option } from "effect"
     3→import { RpcProvider } from "starknet"
     4→import { FalconService } from "../../services/FalconService"
     5→import { StarknetService } from "../../services/StarknetService"
     6→import { ContractAddress, TxHash } from "../../services/types"
     7→import type { FalconKeypair, PackedPublicKey } from "../../services/types"
     8→import {
     9→  deployAccountEffect,
    10→  prepareAccountDeployEffect,
    11→  toUint16PublicKeyNtt,
    12→  validateHexPrivateKey,
    13→} from "../../components/interactive/accountDeployPipeline"
    14→
    15→const getFailureTag = <A, E extends { readonly _tag: string }>(
    16→  exit: Exit.Exit<A, E>,
    17→): string | null => {
    18→  if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {
    19→    return null
    20→  }
    21→  const failure = Cause.failureOption(exit.cause)
    22→  return Option.match(failure, {
    23→    onNone: () => null,
    24→    onSome: (error) => error._tag,
    25→  })
    26→}
    27→
    28→describe("validateHexPrivateKey", () => {
    29→  it("accepts a valid 0x-prefixed private key", async () => {
    30→    const exit = await Effect.runPromiseExit(
    31→      validateHexPrivateKey(
    32→        "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef",
    33→      ),
    34→    )
    35→
    36→    expect(Exit.isSuccess(exit)).toBe(true)
    37→    if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {
    38→      expect(exit.value).toBe(
    39→        "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef",
    40→      )
    41→    }
    42→  })
    43→
    44→  it("fails when key is missing 0x prefix", async () => {
    45→    const exit = await Effect.runPromiseExit(
    46→      validateHexPrivateKey(
    47→        "0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef",
    48→      ),
    49→    )
    50→
    51→    expect(Exit.isFailure(exit)).toBe(true)
    52→    expect(getFailureTag(exit)).toBe("InvalidPrivateKeyError")
    53→  })
    54→
    55→  it("fails when key contains non-hex characters", async () => {
    56→    const exit = await Effect.runPromiseExit(
    57→      validateHexPrivateKey(
    58→        "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdeg",
    59→      ),
    60→    )
    61→
    62→    expect(Exit.isFailure(exit)).toBe(true)
    63→    expect(getFailureTag(exit)).toBe("InvalidPrivateKeyError")
    64→  })
    65→})
    66→
    67→describe("toUint16PublicKeyNtt", () => {
    68→  it("converts Int32Array coefficients into Uint16Array", async () => {
    69→    const coeffs = new Int32Array(512).fill(0)
    70→    coeffs[1] = 12288
    71→    coeffs[2] = 42
    72→
    73→    const exit = await Effect.runPromiseExit(toUint16PublicKeyNtt(coeffs))
    74→
    75→    expect(Exit.isSuccess(exit)).toBe(true)
    76→    if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {
    77→      expect(exit.value).toBeInstanceOf(Uint16Array)
    78→      expect(exit.value[0]).toBe(0)
    79→      expect(exit.value[1]).toBe(12288)
    80→      expect(exit.value[2]).toBe(42)
    81→    }
    82→  })
    83→
    84→  it("fails when coefficient is below range", async () => {
    85→    const coeffs = new Int32Array(512).fill(1)
    86→    coeffs[128] = -1
    87→
    88→    const exit = await Effect.runPromiseExit(toUint16PublicKeyNtt(coeffs))
    89→
    90→    expect(Exit.isFailure(exit)).toBe(true)
    91→    expect(getFailureTag(exit)).toBe("InvalidPublicKeyNttError")
    92→  })
    93→
    94→  it("fails when coefficient is >= 12289", async () => {
    95→    const coeffs = new Int32Array(512).fill(1)
    96→    coeffs[300] = 12289
    97→
    98→    const exit = await Effect.runPromiseExit(toUint16PublicKeyNtt(coeffs))
    99→
   100→    expect(Exit.isFailure(exit)).toBe(true)
   101→    expect(getFailureTag(exit)).toBe("InvalidPublicKeyNttError")
   102→  })
   103→
   104→  it("fails when coefficient array length is not 512", async () => {
   105→    const coeffs = new Int32Array(511).fill(1)
   106→    const exit = await Effect.runPromiseExit(toUint16PublicKeyNtt(coeffs))
   107→
   108→    expect(Exit.isFailure(exit)).toBe(true)
   109→    expect(getFailureTag(exit)).toBe("InvalidPublicKeyNttError")
   110→  })
   111→})
   112→
   113→const VALID_PRIVATE_KEY =
   114→  "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef"
   115→
   116→const MOCK_ADDRESS = ContractAddress.make(
   117→  "0x049d36570d4e46f48e99674bd3fcc84644ddd6b96f7c741b1562b82f9e004dc7",
   118→)
   119→const MOCK_TX_HASH = TxHash.make(
   120→  "0x7f3e2a1b9c4d5e6f0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8091a2b3c4d",
   121→)
   122→
   123→const makeKeypair = (fill: number): FalconKeypair => ({
   124→  secretKey: new Uint8Array(1281).fill(fill),
   125→  verifyingKey: new Uint8Array(896).fill(fill + 1),
   126→  publicKeyNtt: new Int32Array(512).fill(fill + 2),
   127→})
   128→
   129→const MOCK_PACKED_PUBLIC_KEY: PackedPublicKey = {
   130→  slots: Array.from({ length: 29 }, (_, i) => `0x${i.toString(16).padStart(64, "0")}`),
   131→}
   132→
   133→interface FalconLayerOptions {
   134→  readonly generatedKeypair: FalconKeypair
   135→  readonly packedPublicKey: PackedPublicKey
   136→  readonly calls: { generate: number; pack: number }
   137→}
   138→
   139→const makeFalconLayer = (options: FalconLayerOptions) =>
   140→  Layer.succeed(
   141→    FalconService,
   142→    FalconService.make({
   143→    generateKeypair: (_seed?: Uint8Array) => {
   144→      options.calls.generate += 1
   145→      return Effect.succeed(options.generatedKeypair)
   146→    },
   147→    sign: (_secretKey: Uint8Array, _message: Uint8Array) =>
   148→      Effect.succeed({
   149→        signature: new Uint8Array(666),
   150→        salt: new Uint8Array(40),
   151→      }),
   152→    verify: (_verifyingKey: Uint8Array, _message: Uint8Array, _signature: Uint8Array) =>
   153→      Effect.succeed(true),
   154→    createHint: (_s1: Int32Array, _pkNtt: Int32Array) => Effect.succeed(new Uint16Array(512)),
   155→    packPublicKey: (_pkNtt: Uint16Array) => {
   156→      options.calls.pack += 1
   157→      return Effect.succeed({
   158→        slots: Array.from(options.packedPublicKey.slots),
   159→      })
   160→    },
   161→    deserializePublicKeyNtt: (_vkBytes: Uint8Array) => Effect.succeed(new Int32Array(512)),
   162→    signForStarknet: (_sk: Uint8Array, _txHash: string, _pkNtt: Int32Array) =>
   163→      Effect.succeed(Array.from({ length: 61 }, () => "0x0")),
   164→    }),
   165→  )
   166→
   167→interface StarknetLayerOptions {
   168→  readonly balance: bigint
   169→  readonly calls: { compute: number; balance: number; deploy: number }
   170→}
   171→
   172→const makeStarknetLayer = (options: StarknetLayerOptions) =>
   173→  Layer.succeed(
   174→    StarknetService,
   175→    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
   176→    {
   177→      computeDeployAddress: (_packedPk: PackedPublicKey) => {
   178→        options.calls.compute += 1
   179→        return Effect.succeed({ address: MOCK_ADDRESS, salt: "0xdeadbeef" })
   180→      },
   181→      getBalance: (_address: string) => {
   182→        options.calls.balance += 1
   183→        return Effect.succeed(options.balance)
   184→      },
   185→      deployAccount: (_packedPk: PackedPublicKey, _privateKey: string, _salt: string) => {
   186→        options.calls.deploy += 1
   187→        return Effect.succeed({ txHash: MOCK_TX_HASH, address: MOCK_ADDRESS })
   188→      },
   189→      waitForTx: (_txHash: string) => Effect.succeed(undefined),
   190→      provider: new RpcProvider({ nodeUrl: "http://localhost:9999" }),
   191→    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
   192→    } as any,
   193→  )
   194→
   195→const runPipelineEffect = <A, E>(
   196→  effect: Effect.Effect<A, E, FalconService | StarknetService>,
   197→  falconLayer: Layer.Layer<FalconService>,
   198→  starknetLayer: Layer.Layer<StarknetService>,
   199→) =>
   200→  Effect.runPromiseExit(
   201→    effect.pipe(Effect.provide(falconLayer), Effect.provide(starknetLayer)),
   202→  )
   203→
   204→describe("prepareAccountDeployEffect", () => {
   205→  it("reuses keypair from atom state and skips key generation", async () => {
   206→    const reusedKeypair = makeKeypair(5)
   207→    const falconCalls = { generate: 0, pack: 0 }
   208→    const starknetCalls = { compute: 0, balance: 0, deploy: 0 }
   209→    const falconLayer = makeFalconLayer({
   210→      generatedKeypair: makeKeypair(9),
   211→      packedPublicKey: MOCK_PACKED_PUBLIC_KEY,
   212→      calls: falconCalls,
   213→    })
   214→    const starknetLayer = makeStarknetLayer({ balance: 100n, calls: starknetCalls })
   215→
   216→    const exit = await runPipelineEffect(
   217→      prepareAccountDeployEffect({
   218→        privateKey: VALID_PRIVATE_KEY,
   219→        existingKeypair: Option.some(reusedKeypair),
   220→      }),
   221→      falconLayer,
   222→      starknetLayer,
   223→    )
   224→
   225→    expect(Exit.isSuccess(exit)).toBe(true)
   226→    if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {
   227→      expect(exit.value.keypair).toBe(reusedKeypair)
   228→      expect(exit.value.address).toBe(MOCK_ADDRESS)
   229→      expect(exit.value.packedPublicKey.slots).toEqual(
   230→        Array.from(MOCK_PACKED_PUBLIC_KEY.slots),
   231→      )
   232→    }
   233→    expect(falconCalls.generate).toBe(0)
   234→    expect(falconCalls.pack).toBe(1)
   235→    expect(starknetCalls.compute).toBe(1)
   236→  })
   237→
   238→  it("generates a keypair when atom state is empty", async () => {
   239→    const generatedKeypair = makeKeypair(11)
   240→    const falconCalls = { generate: 0, pack: 0 }
   241→    const starknetCalls = { compute: 0, balance: 0, deploy: 0 }
   242→    const falconLayer = makeFalconLayer({
   243→      generatedKeypair,
   244→      packedPublicKey: MOCK_PACKED_PUBLIC_KEY,
   245→      calls: falconCalls,
   246→    })
   247→    const starknetLayer = makeStarknetLayer({ balance: 100n, calls: starknetCalls })
   248→
   249→    const exit = await runPipelineEffect(
   250→      prepareAccountDeployEffect({
   251→        privateKey: VALID_PRIVATE_KEY,
   252→        existingKeypair: Option.none(),
   253→      }),
   254→      falconLayer,
   255→      starknetLayer,
   256→    )
   257→
   258→    expect(Exit.isSuccess(exit)).toBe(true)
   259→    if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {
   260→      expect(exit.value.keypair).toEqual(generatedKeypair)
   261→      expect(exit.value.privateKey).toBe(VALID_PRIVATE_KEY)
   262→    }
   263→    expect(falconCalls.generate).toBe(1)
   264→    expect(falconCalls.pack).toBe(1)
   265→    expect(starknetCalls.compute).toBe(1)
   266→  })
   267→})
   268→
   269→describe("deployAccountEffect", () => {
   270→  it("fails with InsufficientFundsError when balance is below required minimum", async () => {
   271→    const falconCalls = { generate: 0, pack: 0 }
   272→    const starknetCalls = { compute: 0, balance: 0, deploy: 0 }
   273→    const falconLayer = makeFalconLayer({
   274→      generatedKeypair: makeKeypair(1),
   275→      packedPublicKey: MOCK_PACKED_PUBLIC_KEY,
   276→      calls: falconCalls,
   277→    })
   278→    const starknetLayer = makeStarknetLayer({ balance: 0n, calls: starknetCalls })
   279→
   280→    const exit = await runPipelineEffect(
   281→      deployAccountEffect({
   282→        address: MOCK_ADDRESS,
   283→        packedPublicKey: MOCK_PACKED_PUBLIC_KEY,
   284→        privateKey: VALID_PRIVATE_KEY,
   285→        salt: "0xdeadbeef",
   286→        requiredBalance: 1n,
   287→      }),
   288→      falconLayer,
   289→      starknetLayer,
   290→    )
   291→
   292→    expect(Exit.isFailure(exit)).toBe(true)
   293→    expect(getFailureTag(exit)).toBe("InsufficientFundsError")
   294→    expect(starknetCalls.balance).toBe(1)
   295→    expect(starknetCalls.deploy).toBe(0)
   296→  })
   297→
   298→  it("deploys when account balance is funded", async () => {
   299→    const falconCalls = { generate: 0, pack: 0 }
   300→    const starknetCalls = { compute: 0, balance: 0, deploy: 0 }
   301→    const falconLayer = makeFalconLayer({
   302→      generatedKeypair: makeKeypair(1),
   303→      packedPublicKey: MOCK_PACKED_PUBLIC_KEY,
   304→      calls: falconCalls,
   305→    })
   306→    const starknetLayer = makeStarknetLayer({ balance: 2n, calls: starknetCalls })
   307→
   308→    const exit = await runPipelineEffect(
   309→      deployAccountEffect({
   310→        address: MOCK_ADDRESS,
   311→        packedPublicKey: MOCK_PACKED_PUBLIC_KEY,
   312→        privateKey: VALID_PRIVATE_KEY,
   313→        salt: "0xdeadbeef",
   314→        requiredBalance: 1n,
   315→      }),
   316→      falconLayer,
   317→      starknetLayer,
   318→    )
   319→
   320→    expect(Exit.isSuccess(exit)).toBe(true)
   321→    if (Exit.isSuccess(exit)) {
   322→      expect(exit.value.txHash).toBe(MOCK_TX_HASH)
   323→      expect(exit.value.address).toBe(MOCK_ADDRESS)
   324→    }
   325→    expect(starknetCalls.balance).toBe(1)
   326→    expect(starknetCalls.deploy).toBe(1)
   327→  })
   328→})
   329→
